name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Beat margarine and sugar together until fluffy.
3. Stir in cornmeal and flour. Add almonds.
4. Press mixture evenly onto the bottom of an ungreased 9x9-inch baking pan.
5. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until edges are light golden brown.
6. Allow cooling for about 10 minutes; spread with peanut butter.
7. Melt chocolate chips and shortening over low heat, or in microwave.
8. Drizzle melted mixture over the peanut butter.
9. Cut into bars. Makes 1 dozen.
